title: Non GATE CSE - Computer Peripherals - Disk

questions.question:
Consider a disk pack with a seek time of \( 4 \; \text{milliseconds} \) and rotational speed of \( 10000 \) rotations per minute \( \text{(RPM)}. \) It has \( 600 \) sectors per track and each sector can store \( 512 \; \text{bytes} \) of data. Consider a file stored in the disk. The file contains \( 2000 \) sectors. Assume that every sector access necessitates a seek, and the average rotational latency for accessing each sector is half of the time for one complete rotation. The total time \( \text{(in milliseconds)} \) needed to read the entire file is __________



Computer Peripherals: NIELIT 2022 April Scientist B | Section B | Question: 68
